title: Settings
sub_title: Manage your profile, account, and preferences.

profile.title: Profile information
profile.sub_title: Your name and avatar are publicly visible.

confirm.title: Are you sure you want to delete your account?
confirm.sub_title: Once your account is deleted, all its resources and data will be permanently deleted. Please enter your password to confirm that you want to permanently delete your account.

delete.title: Delete account
delete.sub_title: Once your account is deleted, all its resources and data will be permanently deleted.

info.title: Important Information
info.message: Once confirmed, your account email will be updated and you'll need to use the new email for login.

change.title: Confirm Email Change
change.sub_title: Click the button below to confirm your new email address.

email.title: Email address
email.sub_title: A confirmation email will be sent to the new address.

unlink.confirm: Are you sure you want to unlink your {provider} account? You will no longer be able to connect via this provider.

password.title: Password
password.sub_title: Ensure your account uses a long, random password to remain secure.

new.help: For optimal security, your password must be at least 8 characters long.

confirm.help: Re-enter your password to verify that there are no typos.
